news.headline: First Advantage to host first Investor Day on May 28, 2025 in NYC, webcast live at 9:00 a.m. ET, expected to end by 12:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, First Advantage Corporation (NASDAQ: FA), a prominent global software and data provider in the HR technology sector, disclosed plans to conduct its first-ever Investor Day. This event will take place in New York City and will be live-streamed on Wednesday, May 28, 2025, starting at 9:00 a.m. ET. The presentations are scheduled to run until around 12:00 p.m. ET.

news.headline: Olema Oncology issues inducement grants to 5 new employees, offering 64,900 shares of common stock, approved under Nasdaq rule.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: OLMA), a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for breast cancer, announced granting stock options to 5 new employees. These options allow them to purchase a total of 64,900 shares of the company's common stock starting from April 1, 2025. The stock awards were approved by Olema's Compensation Committee and were issued under the 2022 Inducement Plan. This move was made to attract new talent as the employees joined the company, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: The latest data indicate progress towards 2% inflation target may have stalled.
Fed's Kugler: Labor market indicators suggest continued moderation but not significant weakening.

US to apply 30% tariff on imports from South Africa.
EVI Industries acquires Girbau North America, transforming its position in commercial laundry industry.
news.summary: Miami-based EVI Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: EVI) revealed the successful finalization of the acquisition of Girbau North America, Inc. (“GNA”), a major distributor of commercial laundry products. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for EVI as it is foreseen to greatly enhance the company's dominant position in the North American commercial laundry sector. Additionally, the addition of GNA will expand EVI’s team with a core group of talented industry professionals. This move is expected to bolster EVI's market presence and further solidify its foothold in the industry.

New 'Mario Kart' game boosts sales outlook for Nintendo Switch by 2 players, per Bloomberg report.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the annual revenue of Company X reached $5 million last year. This signifies a notable increase of 15% compared to the previous year's revenue of $4.3 million. Furthermore, Company X also reported a net profit of $700,000 for the same fiscal year, which demonstrates a growth of 20% from the previous year's net profit of $580,000. The company attributes this success to their new marketing strategies and product innovations that have resonated well with consumers. They are optimistic about maintaining this positive trajectory in the upcoming fiscal year.

news.headline: Bitcoin soars to $88.5K amid surge in spot volumes. $145M liquidated in past 12 hours, with $69.4M BTC shorts. Will tariff tensions halt rally?
news.summary: Bitcoin price surged to a session high of $88,500 following news of delays in "Liberation Day" tariffs by the Trump administration. Israel, Mexico, and India have also eased tariffs on US imports. Total market liquidations in the past 12 hours hit $145 million, with $69.4 million in Bitcoin shorts. Short liquidations have contributed to the recent price increase. Key players like GameStop and Strategy are increasing their Bitcoin reserves. The market structure is showing signs of transitioning from bearish to bullish as spot buy volume rises.  Key factors influencing Bitcoin's bullish momentum include sustained buy volume at Binance and Coinbase Pro, as well as the market response to the delayed tariffs. Analysts are optimistic about the current rally and potential for hitting $90K BTC next, despite the ever-present risks in investment decisions.

news.headline: Trump: The US imports too many electronics.
Trump reiterates criticism of NAFTA.
Limited rooms available at Augusta's Partridge Inn during Masters Week, offering ultimate luxury experience. #Augusta #MastersTournament
news.summary: In Augusta, Georgia, on April 2, 2025, The Partridge Inn, widely recognized as the city's top historic hotel and renowned meeting place for the Masters Tournament, encourages guests to indulge in the ultimate in Southern extravagance and service. Limited availability remains with just a handful of rooms left for this year's event.

news.headline: New real estate firm Legacy Development Partners focuses on retail, mixed-use projects. Founded by Chris Hake, backed by The Garrett Companies. HQ in Phoenix.
news.summary: Legacy Development Partners is a recently established real estate development company that focuses on retail and mixed-use projects. Founded by industry expert Chris Hake and supported by national multifamily leader The Garrett Companies, the Phoenix-based firm is poised to have a strong presence in the Southwest region and beyond. They specialize in developing and redeveloping single-tenant outparcels, multi-tenant buildings, and grocery-anchored projects. This new venture brings together significant experience and resources to create a notable impact in the real estate development sector.

news.headline: Trump: We cannot pay the deficits of Canada and Mexico.
National Storage Affiliates Trust schedules first quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call.
news.summary: National Storage Affiliates Trust, based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, has disclosed the date for the release of its first quarter 2025 earnings and conference call. The company will be releasing its financial results on [Date], followed by a conference call to discuss the results. Stakeholders and investors can tune in to the call by dialing [Phone Number], with the conference ID [ID Number]. This information aims to keep interested parties informed about the company's performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Broadstone Net Lease to release Q1 2025 earnings, to have conference call. Located in Victor, N.Y. #acquisitions.
news.summary: Victor, New York - Broadstone Net Lease has announced the scheduling of its first quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call. This event is set to take place soon, providing investors and stakeholders with key financial insights. Stay tuned for details on the company's performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Camden Property Trust to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 1st, conference call on May 2nd at 10 AM CT. Domestic Dial-In: (888) 317-6003. Webcast available.
news.summary: Houston-based Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) disclosed that their Q1 2025 earnings report will be published post-market closure on May 1, 2025. A conference call led by management is scheduled for May 2, 2025, at 10:00 AM CT. To participate, use the following dial-in numbers: Domestic - (888) 317-6003, International - (412) 317-6061, with passcode 5843308. The webcast can be accessed at https://investors.camdenliving.com. Interested parties are encouraged to join.

news.headline: Camden Property Trust ranked 18th on Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For list, for the 18th consecutive year.
news.summary: Houston-based Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has secured the 18th spot on Fortune's esteemed 100 Best Companies to Work For list. This marks the company's 18th consecutive year on the list. Keith Oden, the Executive Vice Chairman of Camden Property Trust, expressed gratitude for the recognition. The full list and accompanying stories will be featured in the upcoming April/May issue of Fortune and are currently accessible online.

news.headline: US to set baseline tariff rate of 10% for all countries.
Franklin Covey Co. announces Q2 FY 2025 financial results, ended on Feb 28, 2025. More details on Business Wire.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Franklin Covey Co. (NYSE: FC), a prominent organization for improving organizational performance, has reported its financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on February 28, 2025. The company offers top-tier content, training, processes, and tools on a subscription basis to drive significant changes in human behavior for enhanced results. The quarter's financial performance signifies significant progress for Franklin Covey Co. as it continues to thrive in the industry.

news.headline: Clearwater Analytics and Enfusion set deadline for shareholders of Enfusion to elect merger consideration by 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 16, 2025.
news.summary: Boise based company, Clearwater Analytics (CWAN), and Chicago headquartered Enfusion, Inc. (ENFN), disclosed the time frame for Enfusion shareholders to choose the form of merger consideration they prefer in Clearwater's acquisition of Enfusion. The deadline for this choice, known as the "Merger Consideration," is set at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 16, 2025. This deadline, also referred to as the "Election Deadline," may be extended if necessary.

news.headline: BGL adds Michael Doyle as Managing Director in Consumer, enhancing firm's consumer products coverage.
news.summary: Chicago, April 2, 2025 - In a recent development, Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), a prominent independent investment bank, has expanded its coverage in the consumer products sector by welcoming Doyle to their team. This strategic move aims to enhance the firm's prowess in catering to a wider range of consumer product companies. BGL continues to strengthen its position in the industry by adding expertise and resources, underscoring its commitment to delivering top-notch financial advisory services.

news.headline: Nu Skin Enterprises (NYSE: NUS) to report Q1 2025 results on May 8 after market close, hosting conference call at 5 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Provo, UT - Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. disclosed that the first quarter results for 2025 will be revealed post-market closure on Thursday, May 8. Scheduled at 5 p.m. ET on the same day, the Nu Skin management team will conduct a conference call with investors, addressing recent performance and future business strategies. The investor community can access the webcast of the call and view the financial data discussed. Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the symbol NUS.

news.headline: Trump criticizes the EU on imports of US poultry.
Range Impact buys Fola Mine Complex in West Virginia from AppleAtcha Land, LLC and WV Reclaim Co, LLC.
news.summary: Cleveland-based company Range Impact, Inc. recently disclosed the successful acquisition of the Fola Mine Complex situated in central West Virginia on April 02, 2025. The company, trading publicly under OTCQB: RNGE, specializes in the acquisition, rehabilitation, and repurposing of struggling coal mines in the Appalachian region. This specific acquisition was completed from AppleAtcha Land, LLC and WV Reclaim Co, LLC.

news.headline: Trump cites Canadian tariff on dairy.
Uniti Group Inc. stockholders approve merger with Windstream Holdings II, LLC, with over 90% of shares in favor.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on April 2, 2025, Uniti Group Inc. revealed that its shareholders have endorsed the proposed merger with Windstream Holdings II, LLC ("Windstream"). The vote took place during a special meeting, with over 90% of Uniti's common stock shares present and represented at the meeting approving the merger. Uniti Group Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol UNIT.

news.headline: FirstService elects 8 directors at annual meeting; term until next year.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, FirstService Corporation disclosed that all eight director nominees outlined in the management information circular from February 12, 2025, were elected during the annual virtual shareholder meeting. The directors are elected to serve until the subsequent annual meeting of shareholders. The company trades under the tickers TSX: FSV and NASDAQ: FSV.

news.headline: Precision Drilling Corp. files Management Information Circular for 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. Visit www.precisiondrilling.com for details.
news.summary: Precision Drilling Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, released news on April 2, 2025, about the filing of its Management Information Circular for the 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The company's ticker symbols are TSX:PD and NYSE:PDS. Shareholders can access the Circular on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and on EDGAR at www.sec.gov. Additionally, the Circular is posted on Precision's website at www.precisiondrilling.com.

news.headline: Occidental (NYSE: OXY) to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 7, hold conference call the next day. Call scheduled for 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central on May 8.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Occidental (NYSE: OXY) revealed its plan to disclose the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 post-market closing on May 7, 2025. Moreover, they confirmed holding a conference call to review the results on May 8, 2025, at 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central.

news.headline: Burrell Communications Group appoints God-is Rivera as Chief Strategy Officer to leadership team in Chicago.
news.summary: Tara DeVeaux, the CEO of Burrell Communications Group, a prominent Black-owned advertising agency, has appointed a renowned industry leader as the Chief Strategy Officer. This move was announced on April 2, 2025, in Chicago. The agency is well-known globally for its impactful work in the advertising industry. The new Chief Strategy Officer is recognized for expertise in strategy and marketing, bringing valuable experience to the team. This decision reflects the agency's commitment to maintaining its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Caldera unveils PrimeCenter 4.0, upgrading production automation software to simplify job prep for digital printing.
news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois on April 2, 2025, Caldera, a division of Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled PrimeCenter 4.0. This latest software update aims to streamline job preparation and enhance production workflows for digital processing. The release is expected to make operations more efficient, with users benefiting from improved automation features. This launch marks a significant advancement in the industry, offering cutting-edge solutions to enhance productivity.

news.headline: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX) to release 2025 Q1 financial results on April 23rd after market close.
news.summary: Houston-based Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX) disclosed that it will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 23, 2025, post-market closure. The company, which operates Third Coast Bank, shared this information today.

news.headline: MAA to release first quarter 2025 results on April 30 after market close, conference call set for May 1 at 9:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Germantown, Tennessee, MAA (NYSE: MAA) disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the markets close. They will conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 9:00 AM Central Time.

news.headline: Albemarle Corp (NYSE: ALB) will release Q1 2025 earnings on April 30, 2025, after NYSE closes in Charlotte, N.C.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Albemarle Corporation, a key player in supplying essential elements for various sectors, including mobility, energy, connectivity, and health, revealed its plan to unveil the first quarter 2025 earnings once the NYSE concludes its activities on Wednesday. ALB, traded on NYSE, is a renowned global entity known for its contributions to these industries.

news.headline: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. will release first quarter 2025 earnings on May 5, 2025, with a conference call on May 6 at 9:00 am CT.
news.summary: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) based in Austin, Texas, will report its first quarter financial results for 2025 after market close on Monday, May 5. The earnings release will be followed by a conference call on Tuesday, May 6 at 9:00am CT (10:00am ET) to discuss operational and financial performance. Interested individuals can access a live webcast at https://ir.atlas.energy/. It is advisable to join the webcast at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time.

news.headline: WesBanco to hold Q1 earnings call on April 30 at 9:00 a.m. ET with President and CEO Jeffrey H. Jackson.
news.summary: Wheeling, West Virginia - On April 2, 2025, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC) disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The call will be hosted by Jeffrey H. Jackson, President and Chief Executive Officer. WesBanco, a diverse multi-state bank holding company, will use this platform to communicate important updates to shareholders and analysts.

news.headline: EQT Corp to release Q1 2025 results on April 22, 2025, holding conference call the next day to discuss.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) announced their intention to release their financial and operating results for the first quarter after the market closes on Tuesday, April 22, 2025. Subsequently, they will conduct a conference call to discuss the results and other pertinent topics on Wednesday.

news.headline: Tronox changed the time for Q1 2025 webcast to 9:00 AM ET on May 1 due to scheduling conflict, one hour later than before.
news.summary: Tronox Holdings plc (NYSE: TROX) released an update regarding the timing of its first quarter 2025 webcast conference call. The call, originally scheduled for Thursday, May 1, 2025, will now take place at 9:00 AM ET, an hour later than previously planned. This change was made to address a scheduling conflict. The announcement was made from Stamford, Conn., on April 2, 2025.
